fragility_points: A sharp selloff into April 19-20 would compress the cushion quickly.
Minute-candle and timezone interpretation are source-sensitive and must be checked again at settlement.
key_assumptions: BTC remains sufficiently above 70000 over the next five days that ordinary volatility does not push the exact noon ET minute close below the threshold.
Binance remains the usable governing resolution surface for BTCUSDT on April 20.
main_logical_chain: Verify the governing contract mechanics directly from the market rules.
Verify current Binance BTCUSDT is materially above 70000.
Treat recent Binance daily closes as contextual evidence that BTC is operating above the threshold regime.
Discount from near-certainty because this is an exact-minute close market with five days of residual volatility.
main_thesis: BTC is already materially above 70000 on Binance, making Yes likely by April 20 noon ET, but exact-minute close mechanics keep real downside risk alive.
quote_anchors: This market will resolve to 'Yes' if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final 'Close' price higher than the price specified in the title.
source_quality_view: Primary rules source and governing venue check are strong, but evidence independence is only medium-low because the contract appropriately centers on Binance.
strongest_disconfirmers: The contract resolves on one exact 12:00 ET one-minute close, not on any touch or daily close.
A normal crypto drawdown over five days could still push BTC below 70000 at the qualifying minute.
strongest_supports: Direct Binance ticker check showed BTCUSDT around 73974, about 5.7% above the threshold.
Recent Binance daily closes were also above 70000, suggesting the setup is not just a transient spike.
Yes does not require further upside; it mostly requires the current regime to persist.
timing_relevance: The event resolves in about five days and depends on one exact noon ET minute close, so short-horizon volatility remains materially relevant.
unresolved_ambiguities: Final candle-proof cannot yet be captured because the event has not occurred.
UI-specific Binance candle display nuances remain a minor source-of-truth handling risk.
what_would_change_view: A sustained BTC move back toward or below 70000 on Binance before April 20 would move the estimate down materially; continued holding well above low-70k into April 18-19 would move it up somewhat.
